notes: Instruments page refinements. (1) Each investment card now shows a 'Projected value now' headline = the engine's projected current-month balance (growth + contributions to date), matching the Projection page's Running Balances; the editable field is relabelled 'Starting balance' (still the projection input). (2) Action dates are now logged via a proper month/calendar picker: Close/Step-up/Pause/Resume all open the timeline editor with a month input instead of the old prompt(). For an investment closed at/before the current month, saving the close auto-opens the Journal redeem modal pre-filled with the full balance (materializes a real transaction); future closes stay projection-only. (3) Every logged action shows in the card's history with an × delete button to remove it (recomputes instantly). EMI cards show the monthly EMI for now — projected outstanding / months-remaining is the deferred next build (needs amortization back-tracking from amount owed).
